title: Requisites
doc_html:
Art. 3475.  Requisites

The requisites for the acquisitive prescription of ten years are: possession of ten years, good faith, just title, and a thing susceptible of acquisition by prescription.

Acts 1982, No. 187, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1983.
